---
id: Q-02
topic: Concurrent editors in review sessions
stage: any
blocking: false
---
## Context

`localStorage` is single-browser — if two reviewers open the same `review.html`
side-by-side, whoever saves last silently clobbers the other. SJ works solo on
these reviews today; no pairing precedent exists in the pipeline. See
`docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:236-243`.

## Recommended

- **Option A — Defer until real need:** No pairing has happened yet in the
  presentation pipeline (`agents/cast-preso-*` checker runs all single-user).
  Pre-solving would add a backend + conflict model for an imaginary scenario.
  Reference: `docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:240`.

## Alternatives

- **Option B — Ship with a conflict banner:** Detect a `localStorage` version
  bump and warn. Cheap safety rail (~20 lines), but triggers for the solo case
  too if the browser opens two tabs. See `static/review.js:231-235` for the
  existing save path where this would hook in.

## References

- `docs/plan/2026-04-17-preso-editable-preview.md:236-243`
- `agents/cast-preso-review/static/review.js:231-235`
